Fields.Name: Logic ID
Fields.Description: Set the ID of the logic created by the script.

Fields.Name: Battle Goal ID
Fields.Description: Battle goal ID

Fields.Name: Vision - Distance
Fields.Description: Search range by visual search.

Fields.Name: Vision - Search Height Angle
Fields.Description: Searching enemy vision_angle (height) [deg]

Fields.Name: Vision - Width
Fields.Description: Search range by visual search.

Fields.Name: Script Type
Fields.Description: Script type information to interpret

Fields.Name: Cannot Recapture Enemy: Goal Action
Fields.Description: Goal action when the target becomes unrecapturable

Fields.Name: Cover Action Release Distance
Fields.Description: In meters.

Fields.Name: Search Forget Time - Level 1
Fields.Description: Search enemy Lv1 Target Time to forget.

Fields.Name: Search Forget Time - Level 2
Fields.Description: Search enemy Lv2 time to forget the target.

Fields.Name: Back Home Time on Touching Enemy Wall
Fields.Description: The life of the BackToHome goal when it touches an enemy wall that blocks the block

Fields.Name: Vision - Search Forget Time
Fields.Description: Time to forget the visual target.

Fields.Name: Blocked Movement - Anim ID
Fields.Description: An action that automatically takes place when a destructible object stops it.

Fields.Name: Listen - Distance
Fields.Description: Hearing search range ...

Fields.Name: Call Help - Action Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID (EzStateAnimID) when responding

Fields.Name: Call Help - Call Action ID
Fields.Description: Action ID (EzStateAnimID) when calling a friend

Fields.Name: Vision - Distance
Fields.Description: Visual search range.

Fields.Name: Guard action ID when returning home
Fields.Description: Action number to perform when looking at the target when returning home (intended for use in guarding, 0 disables)

Fields.Name: Listen - Sound Cutoff Distance
Fields.Description: The distance to reduce the size of the sound source. You will not hear any sound below this distance.

Fields.Name: Sense - Distance
Fields.Description: Search range by smell.

Fields.Name: Retreat Home - Max Distance
Fields.Description: COMMON_SetBattleActLogic argument

Fields.Name: Retreat Home - Distance
Fields.Description: COMMON_SetBattleActLogic argument

Fields.Name: Retreat Home - Battle Distance
Fields.Description: COMMON_SetBattleActLogic argument

Fields.Name: Non-Battle Act Duration when in Combat
Fields.Description: COMMON_SetBattleActLogic argument

Fields.Name: Retreat Home - Look for Target Time
Fields.Description: When returning home: Time to look at the target [sec]

Fields.Name: Retreat Home - Look for Target Distance
Fields.Description: When returning home: Distance to see the target [m]

Fields.Name: Listen - Search Forget Time
Fields.Description: Time to forget the sound target.

Fields.Name: Call Help - My Peer ID
Fields.Description: My fellow group ID

Fields.Name: Call Help - Call Peer ID
Fields.Description: Companion group ID to call a companion

Fields.Name: Target System - Damage Effect Rate
Fields.Description: Damage impact rate acquisition (target system evaluation information)

Fields.Name: Team Attack Effectivity
Fields.Description: A value for determining the number of simultaneous attacks in a team. Increasing the value reduces the number of people who can participate in the attack at the same time.

Fields.Name: Vision - Height Angle
Fields.Description: Visual search range.

Fields.Name: Vision - Width Angle
Fields.Description: Visual search range.

Fields.Name: Disable Darkness Modifier to Distance
Fields.Description: Whether the alert vision_distance and battle start distance are not affected by the darkness

Fields.Name: Caravan Role
Fields.Description: Role in the caravan

Fields.Name: Call Help - Valid Target Min Distance
Fields.Description: If it is closer than this value, you cannot call a friend.

Fields.Name: Call Help - Valid Target Range
Fields.Description: Do not call if the companion is farther than this value.

Fields.Name: Call Help - Forget Time by Arrival
Fields.Description: Time to respond

Fields.Name: Call Help - Min Wait Time
Fields.Description: Minimum time for the first wait goal of the response goal [101 => 10.1sec]

Fields.Name: Call Help - Max Wait Time
Fields.Description: Maximum time for the first waiting goal of the response goal [101 => 10.1sec]

Fields.Name: Goal Action - Search Level 1
Fields.Description: Goal action when target has reached search level 1

Fields.Name: Goal Action - Search Level 1
Fields.Description: Goal action when target has reached search level 1

Fields.Name: Call Help - Reply Behavior Type
Fields.Description: Action type to target position after response

Fields.Name: Disable Path Move
Fields.Description: Whether to move directly without following the path even if a path move command comes

Fields.Name: Skip Arrival Visibility Check
Fields.Description: Do you want to skip the arrival judgment by the line of sight? When set to On, arrival judgment is performed even if the line of sight does not pass.

Fields.Name: Think Attribute - Do Admirer
Fields.Description: Thinking attribute: When turned on, it plays a role of surrounding.

Fields.Name: Navigation - Edge
Fields.Description: Can you pass through the node cliff? (def: 1)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Large Space
Fields.Description: Can you pass through the node wide? (def: 1)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Ladder
Fields.Description: Can you pass through the node ladder? (def: 0)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Hole
Fields.Description: Can you go through the node hole? (def: 0)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Door
Fields.Description: Can you pass through the node door? (def: 0)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Ignore Navmesh Wall
Fields.Description: Can you pass through the node in the wall? (def: 0)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Cliff Edge
Fields.Description: Can you pass the node cliff under normal / alert conditions? (def: 1)

Fields.Name: Search Threshold - Level 0 to Level 1
Fields.Description: Search enemy Lv0  Lv1 threshold

Fields.Name: Search Threshold - Level 1 to Level 2
Fields.Description: Search enemy Lv1  Lv2 threshold

Fields.Name: Platoon - Reply Time
Fields.Description: Platoon reaction delay time [sec]

Fields.Name: Platoon - Reply Add Random Time
Fields.Description: Platoon reaction additional random time [sec]

Fields.Name: Virtual Camera Horizontal Field of View
Fields.Description: In degrees.

Fields.Name: Virtual Camera Vertical Field of View
Fields.Description: In degrees.

Fields.Name: Virtual Camera Follows Target
Fields.Description: Whether the virtual camera should point in the direction of the target.

Fields.Name: Reaction When Hit While Unspotted
Fields.Description: How the NPC reacts to being hit w/o having spotted the player.

Fields.Name: Turret Mode Release Distance
Fields.Description: In meters.

Fields.Name: Target Forget Time After Damage
Fields.Description: In seconds.

Fields.Name: Raycast Distance for Target Keeping
Fields.Description: In meters.

Fields.Name: Use Boost Increase
Fields.Description: Whether to use boost rising operation instead of system movement when jumping.

Fields.Name: Accept Target Sharing
Fields.Description: Does this target accept shared target warnings from other entities?

Fields.Name: Visual Generation Distance
Fields.Description: The viering angle starts at this distance behind the center of the character. In meters.

Fields.Name: Visual Cut Distance
Fields.Description: This distance is not recognized from the viewing angle position. In meters.

Fields.Name: Action Type When Pathfinding Fails
Fields.Description: The default action to take when the end point of an alternative path is reached or when a path search fails.

Fields.Name: Path search cost parameter ID
Fields.Description: Determines pathfinding costs.

Fields.Name: Action Type When Pathfinding Fails (Non-Combat)
Fields.Description: When there is no target, this is the action to take after changing the current location to the nest.

Fields.Name: Is Buddy AI
Fields.Description: Thoughts for a buddy? (Unused)

Fields.Name: Goal Action - To Caution (Sound)
Fields.Description: Goal action: Target becomes alert due to normal sound detection

Fields.Name: Goal Action - Alert/Critical Sound
Fields.Description: Goal action: Target becomes alert due to detection of significant sound.

Fields.Name: Allow Jumps While Moving
Fields.Description: Allows jumping during movement.

Fields.Name: Disable Local Steering
Fields.Description: (Unused) Do you want to turn off local steering, which is the behavior of trying to move while avoiding other characters?

Fields.Name: Goal Action - Alert State/Threat Sound
Fields.Description: Goal action: Target becomes alert due to detecting a threat sound

Fields.Name: Goal Action - Returning Home
Fields.Description: Goal action: Entered a state where you'll go home no matter what.

Fields.Name: Memory target forget time
Fields.Description: Time to forget memory target. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Goal Action - Return home while fighting
Fields.Description: Goal action: Entered the state of returning home while fighting

Fields.Name: Spotlight coverage
Fields.Description: Whether enemy search visibility occlusion (raycast) is enabled.

Fields.Name: Always Align Vision To Dummy Poly
Fields.Description: Whether to always use dummy poly as the standard for visibility (Dmy ID: 250

Fields.Name: Share Target Type
Fields.Description: Sets the type of target to share to.

Fields.Name: Goal Action - Discovered State
Fields.Description: Goal action: Target is discovered.

Fields.Name: Goal Action - Searching State
Fields.Description: Goal action: Searching for enemy.

Fields.Name: Goal Action - Memory Target State
Fields.Description: Goal Action: Memory Target State.

Fields.Name: Goal Action - Start Normal State
Fields.Description: Action when transitioning to normal state.

Fields.Name: Goal Action - ID
Fields.Description: ID for general AI behavior outside of combat (only valid when the script type is Operation).

Fields.Name: Vision - Radar
Fields.Description: Radar search range. Radar detects through any object.

Fields.Name: Vision - Upper Altitude Limit
Fields.Description: Upper limit of visual perception altitude. In meters.

Fields.Name: Vision - Lower Altitude Limit
Fields.Description: Lower limit of visual perception altitude. In meters.

Fields.Name: Vision - Search Upper Altitude Limit
Fields.Description: Enemy visual recognition upper limit altitude. In meters.

Fields.Name: Vision - Search Lower Altitude Limit
Fields.Description: Enemy visual recognition lower limit altitude. In meters.

Fields.Name: Search Target Share Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which search targets are shared.

Fields.Name: Attack Target Share Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which attack targets are shared.

Fields.Name: Search Target Share Speed
Fields.Description: The upper limit for the ''distance for sharing search targets.'' The initial value is 0m, and the shared range expands over time. -1 is an invalid value, and immediately shares within the maximum range.

Fields.Name: Attack Target Share Speed
Fields.Description: The upper limit for the ''distance for sharing attack targets.'' The initial value is 0m, and the shared range expands over time. -1 is an invalid value, and immediately shares within the maximum range.

Fields.Name: Fixed Turret Mode - Disable Distance When Hit
Fields.Description: Distance to disable fixed gun turret when hit. In meters.

Fields.Name: Target Share Distance
Fields.Description: (Unused) The distance at which characters' searchability values are shared. In meters.

Fields.Name: Engagement Share Distance
Fields.Description: (Unused) The distance at which characters share their engagement values. In meters.

Fields.Name: Target Share Percentage
Fields.Description: The percentage of characters who share their targets.

Fields.Name: Engagement Share Percentage
Fields.Description: The percentage of characters who share their engagements.

Fields.Name: Radar Performance
Fields.Description: A performance value that compares the target's stealth performance to determine whether it can be detected by radar.

Fields.Name: General Attack - Equipment Part
Fields.Description: General attack equipment location setting, depending on the number of AI_WEAPON_PLACE_, -1 if none

Fields.Name: General Attack - Distance
Fields.Description: In meters.

Fields.Name: Cover Attack - Distance
Fields.Description: In meters.

Fields.Name: Shared Target Recognition Delay
Fields.Description: Delay time between receiving a shared target and recognizing it. in seconds.

Fields.Name: Shared Target Time After Death
Fields.Description: The time, in seconds, that target sharing processing will continue after the character dies after reaching maximum range. If set to 0, sharing will stop immediately after death even if the maximum range is not reached.
